steps.expected: Direct visible child categories render in Sub-Categories grid
steps.observed: Grid rendered 3 direct children: repl_child, src, src_1 with article counts

steps.action: Compare API/DB child list for cat_id=15
steps.expected: Only direct visible children shown with matching data
steps.observed: UI matched API/DB: 3 visible direct children, counts 1/0/0

steps.expected: Heading and description match category record
steps.observed: Heading g5dupdel_1773939084_repl_parent and description g5dupdel replacement parent category displayed

steps.expected: DB values match rendered content
steps.observed: DB cat_name/cat_description matched rendered heading/description

steps.expected: Article list and pagination controls appear when total exceeds page size
steps.observed: List rendered with Previous/Next controls and first page articles ut_browse_crosscut_pag_22..13

steps.expected: Page 2 shows different article slice
steps.observed: Page 2 showed ut_browse_crosscut_pag_12..03 (different from page 1)

steps.expected: Total and paging metadata consistent
steps.observed: API reported total=22, limit=10, page=1 and page=2 as expected

assertions.title: Breadcrumb Navigation

steps.expected: Breadcrumb includes Categories -> ancestor(s) -> current category, all as links
steps.observed: Breadcrumb showed Categories and parent as links, but current category rendered as non-link text

steps.expected: UI matches full linked breadcrumb chain
steps.observed: API included parent and current entries; UI did not render current entry as a link

assertions.issues: Current category breadcrumb segment is not a link, which does not meet the assertion contract wording that each segment be linked.

steps.expected: No-articles message shown instead of article list
steps.observed: Page displayed 'No articles found in this category.'

steps.expected: Article total is zero
steps.observed: API returned articles.total=0

steps.expected: Page renders cleanly without sub-category grid errors
steps.observed: Page loaded cleanly; no Sub-Categories section rendered

steps.expected: No JS errors
steps.observed: No console errors

assertions.title: Invalid Category URI Redirect

steps.expected: HTTP 302 redirect to /categories
steps.observed: Browser ended at /categories, but direct HTTP request returned 200 (SPA shell), not 302

steps.expected: Invalid category handling path confirms non-existent resource
steps.observed: API returned 404 {"error":"Category not found"}

assertions.issues: Observed client-side redirect behavior, but contract requires HTTP 302 redirect response.

steps.expected: Categories heading and top-level visible categories are listed
steps.observed: Heading 'Categories' rendered with root-level category links

steps.expected: Public category list request succeeds
steps.observed: GET /api/categories returned 200 with visible category data

steps.action: Check homepage and category browse pages
steps.expected: Hidden categories are absent from public grids/sidebar/browse
steps.observed: Hidden categories g2core_6a598d_child and g4edit_target_cei_renamed were not present

steps.expected: Hidden categories excluded from search filter options
steps.observed: Dropdown options excluded both hidden category names

steps.action: Open grandchild page with hidden ancestor and inspect breadcrumb
steps.expected: Hidden category not shown in breadcrumbs
steps.observed: Breadcrumb contained root + current; hidden ancestor excluded

assertions.title: Responsive/Accessible Layout

steps.action: Set viewport to 320, 768, 1024, 1440 and load homepage
steps.expected: No horizontal overflow at all widths; nav accessible
steps.observed: No overflow at 320 and 1440; horizontal overflow detected at 768 and 1024

steps.expected: Navigation usable at each width
steps.observed: Navigation available via menu button at 320 and visible links at larger widths

assertions.issues: documentElement.scrollWidth exceeded viewport width at 768 and 1024, indicating horizontal overflow.

frictions.description: Existing seeded data did not provide enough visible articles in one category to exercise pagination transitions for VAL-BROWSE-003.
frictions.resolution: Created temporary prefixed articles (ut_browse_crosscut_pag_*) for validation, captured evidence, then removed all temporary rows after testing.

frictions.description: agent-browser network export does not include response status codes.
frictions.resolution: Captured supplemental curl evidence for required status codes and payload snippets.

summary: Tested 10 assertions: 7 passed, 3 failed (VAL-BROWSE-004 breadcrumb current item not linked, VAL-BROWSE-007 expected HTTP 302 not observed, VAL-XCUT-003 horizontal overflow at 768/1024).
